---
title: "test_freya_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_freya_empire.py"
loc: 62
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 9.14
overall_score: 4.56
---

## Intent
The `test_freya_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestFreyaEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_files, test_scan_hover_breach, test_scan_tailwind_arbitrary, test_scan_color_deviance, test_valid_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestFreyaEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_files, test_scan_hover_breach, test_scan_tailwind_arbitrary, test_scan_color_deviance, test_valid_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.freya](file://src.sentinel.wardens.freya)

### Exports
- `TestFreyaEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_files`
- `test_scan_hover_breach`
- `test_scan_tailwind_arbitrary`
- `test_scan_color_deviance`
- `test_valid_file`
